tasks.title: Reach 100% JS/TS/TSX/JSX compatibility with minimum code and maximum performance
tasks.notes: North star. 100% of full test262 (~53k files) + TypeScript (~18k cases) conformance, native execution, no bytecode/JIT, minimum code, maximum performance. Split into concrete milestone tasks 309-319 below. All work ordered by priority, then effort/impact, with complete fast Rust unit test coverage.

tasks.title: Complete fast Rust unit test coverage
tasks.notes: Ensure every JS/TS/TSX/JSX spec behavior has a focused Rust unit test or fixture. Regressions caught in seconds. No feature/fix without a test.

tasks.title: Establish spec test fixtures
tasks.notes: Define fixture format and directory layout under tests/spec_fixtures/. Every compatibility task must reference the fixture files it adds/fixes. Contributes to complete fast Rust unit test coverage.

tasks.title: Load real test262 harness includes
tasks.notes: Measurement blocker. ~298 test262 tests are skipped because helpers are stubbed. Load $262, assert.compareArray, assert.throws, etc. High impact, medium effort.

tasks.title: Audit and shrink test262 feature skip list
tasks.notes: Measurement. Low effort, high impact. Remove outdated skip reasons so real failures surface and get fixed.

tasks.title: Preserve thrown values in try/catch/throw
tasks.notes: Quick win. Low effort, high impact. Stop stringifying exceptions; negative tests need real error types.

tasks.title: Improve negative-test matching by type and phase
tasks.notes: Measurement. Low effort, high impact. Match test262 negative tests by expected error type/phase instead of coarse string comparison.

tasks.title: Fix object storage for array indices
tasks.notes: New win. Numeric keys are stored in both elements and properties; delete/own_keys are wrong. Low effort, high impact.

tasks.title: Make Boolean and Number real constructors
tasks.notes: New win. Boolean is NativeFunction only; Number constructor is discarded. Low effort, high impact.

tasks.title: Add Object and Function prototype default methods
tasks.notes: New win. Missing toString/valueOf/hasOwnProperty/call/apply/bind. Low-medium effort, high impact.

tasks.title: Make object property enumeration insertion-ordered
tasks.notes: New win. HashMap iteration is unordered; Object.keys must follow insertion order. Low-medium effort, high impact.

tasks.title: Implement spec-correct parseInt and parseFloat
tasks.notes: New win. Current implementations use str::parse and ignore radix/whitespace/early termination. Low-medium effort, high impact.

tasks.title: Complete expression syntax gaps
tasks.notes: Broad win. Medium effort, very high impact. Template literals, computed keys, spread, ??, ?., delete, unary +, for-of. Unblocks 100+ TS expression failures. Fixtures: tests/spec_fixtures/expressions/*.

tasks.title: Register Array, Error, Date as constructors
tasks.notes: Broad win. Medium effort, very high impact. Blocks thousands of built-in tests and any new Array/Error. Fixture: tests/spec_fixtures/objects/constructor_registration.js.

tasks.title: Arrow function use strict validation
tasks.notes: Core semantics. Medium effort, high impact. Strict mode enforcement; unblocks onlyStrict tests and changes this/globals behavior.

tasks.title: Use global object as environment record
tasks.notes: Core semantics. Medium effort, medium-high impact. globalThis/variable parity.

tasks.title: Implement property descriptors and defineProperty
tasks.notes: Core semantics. High effort, high impact. Object semantics, getters/setters, built-in attribute checks.

tasks.title: Implement trampoline interpreter with explicit call stack
tasks.notes: Architecture. Very high impact, high effort. Replaces recursive AST walker; required to run whole test262 suites.

tasks.title: Implement native ES module support for Quench apps
tasks.notes: Feature. High impact, high effort. Native import/export instead of stripping.

tasks.title: Class support and conformance skip fixes
tasks.notes: Feature. Medium-high effort, very high impact. Classes, super, extends, static fields.

tasks.title: Implement real Promise resolution and microtasks
tasks.notes: Feature. Medium effort, very high impact. Async/await/generators depend on this.

tasks.title: Install String.prototype once instead of per-access closures
tasks.notes: Perf quick win. Low effort, high impact. Every string property access currently allocates a closure. Fixture: tests/spec_fixtures/expressions/optional_chaining.js.

tasks.title: Avoid cloning array elements in builtin methods
tasks.notes: Perf quick win. Low effort, high impact. Array methods clone the elements vector; operate on mutable borrow instead.

tasks.title: Share function bodies via Rc<[Statement]>
tasks.notes: Perf quick win. Low effort, high impact. Stop cloning function bodies on every Value clone.

tasks.title: Remove debug eprintln! spam
tasks.notes: Cleanup. TDZ refactor left debug prints. Trivial effort, medium impact.

tasks.title: String.prototype.length uses UTF-16 code units
tasks.notes: Cleanup. Currently uses UTF-8 byte length. Trivial effort, medium impact.

tasks.title: Fix JSON.stringify(undefined)
tasks.notes: Cleanup. Undefined serializes as null. Trivial effort, medium impact.

tasks.title: Fix for-of Symbol.iterator lookup
tasks.notes: Cleanup. for-of looks up property named 'Symbol' instead of Symbol.iterator. Low effort, medium impact.

tasks.title: Delete dead scope.rs module
tasks.notes: Cleanup. scope.rs is unused. Trivial effort, low impact.

tasks.title: Expressions coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of test262 language/expressions/ and TS expression tests pass. Depends on 290, 291, 289, 283.

tasks.title: Statements coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of test262 language/statements/ and TS statement tests pass. Depends on 281, 292, 250, 141.

tasks.title: Functions coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of test262 language/functions/ and TS function tests pass. Depends on 293, 292, 305, 117, 124.

tasks.title: Objects and prototypes coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of built-ins/Object/, Reflect, and prototype-chain tests pass. Depends on 294, 295, 289.

tasks.title: Arrays and built-ins coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of built-ins Array/String/Number/Boolean/Date/Error tests pass. Depends on 289, 283, 284, 147, 191, 132, 239.

tasks.title: Errors and exceptions coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of language/exceptions/ and built-ins/Error/ tests pass. Depends on 250, 132, 105, 112.

tasks.title: Classes coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of test262 language/class/ tests pass. Depends on 182, 183, 187.

tasks.title: Modules coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of test262 language/module-code/ and TS module tests pass. Depends on 241.

tasks.title: Async / Promise / generator coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of built-ins/Promise/ and async-function tests pass. Depends on 251.

tasks.title: TypeScript coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of TypeScript runtime conformance cases pass after type erasure. Depends on 290, 289, 241, 182.

tasks.title: JSX / TSX coverage
tasks.notes: Milestone of 296. 100% of JSX/TSX examples and tests render correctly via Ink runtime. Depends on 318.

tasks.title: Enforce granular unit-test policy
tasks.notes: Process. One behavior, one test; every task lists test file/name. Updated EXECUTE.md and docs/hir-design.md.

tasks.title: Add JS/TS scenario test harness
tasks.notes: Process. Run real JS/TS snippets from Rust tests. High impact, medium effort.

tasks.title: Runtime optimization roadmap
tasks.notes: Tracking. Findings in docs/runtime-optimization-roadmap.md.

tasks.title: Address strict linting violations (500-line files, 40-line functions, complexity 10)
tasks.notes: Large effort, high impact. Enforce 500/40/10 on every *.rs file. Best done incrementally between other tasks.

tasks.title: Leverage Rust for runtime execution model
tasks.notes: Large effort, high impact. Rust ownership/explicit-stack patterns. Supports trampoline and HIR.

tasks.title: Implement the typed HIR execution model
tasks.notes: Very high impact, very high effort. Type-aware HIR + trampoline. Depends on Tasks 85 and quick-win cleanup.

tasks.title: Analyze and enable whole-suite conformance runs
tasks.notes: Large effort, high impact analysis. Whole-suite test262/TS runs and regression tracking.
